title: Magic Rings
body: ![Alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Magic_Rings/BH_MR_Header.webp) --- ![Alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Magic_Rings/BH_MR_Desc2.webp) --- **!!!BIG NEWS!!!** Version of Magic Rings 6.4 is the final version of this mod!! I will be making new mod's there will be no more updates!!! --- This mod introduces the Jolly Mon ore, found at specific depths(0 to -15 Y coordinates). It offers a rare resource, mineable with a netherite pickaxe. Discover a variety of rings, each with distinct effects and levels, such as speed, strength, fire resistance, and more. Delve into the world of ultimate rings, combination rings, and even anti rings, providing unique effects to nearby mobs. Unleash the power of these rings to enhance your gameplay! --- ![Alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Magic_Rings/BH_MR_Desc1.webp) --- Translated to: - Russian - English - German - Ukrainian - French - Spanish --- Also can be found: Curseforge: [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/magic-rings) --- [![Alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Magic_Rings/BH_MR_Promo.webp)](https://jenki258.github.io/Bisect-Hosting-Link/) [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Rituals_Of_The_Wilds/MP_RitualsOfTheWilds_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/qFrhaYnDAZ)
